 
An investor makes an application to purchase units of a liquid fund. If an application is made on 
Monday and the fund gets realized by 1 p.m. on Monday, it will be Sunday's NAV. If it gets realized 
by 3 pm on Monday, it will be Tuesday's NAV. If it gets realized by 10 am on Wednesday, it will 
beTuesday's NAV.
